ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "stop_code" TEXT /* Code of the stop */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "stop_lat" TEXT /* Latitude of the stop */,
  "stop_lon" TEXT /* Longitude of the stop */,
  "stop_type" TEXT /* Type of stop (e.g., bus stop, tram station) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the stop */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stop is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the stop is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the stop */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stop */,
  "wheelchair_boarding" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the stop is wheelchair accessible */,
  "bicycle_facility" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the stop has bicycle facilities */,
  "parking_facility" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the stop has parking facilities */,
  "stop_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the stop */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of vehicle that services the stop (e.g., bus, tram) */,
  "transit_authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit authority managing the stop */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stop information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the stop was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_transit_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("transit_authority_id") REFERENCES transit_authorities ("transit_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transit_authorities" (
  "transit_authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transit authority */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the transit authority */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the transit authority */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the transit authority */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the transit authority */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the transit authority */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the transit authority is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the transit authority is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the transit authority */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the transit authority */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the transit authority was established */,
  "number_of_vehicles" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles operated by the transit authority */,
  "number_of_routes" INTEGER /* Total number of routes managed by the transit authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transit_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type (e.g., Bus, Tram) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., diesel, electric) */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standard of the vehicle */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "transit_authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit authority managing the route */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Starting point of the route */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* Ending point of the route */,
  "schedule_url" TEXT /* URL for the route schedule */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., regular, express, night) */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the route in km/h */,
  "number_of_stops" INTEGER /* Total number of stops on the route */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., every 15 minutes, every 30 minutes) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the route information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the route was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_transit_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("transit_authority_id") REFERENCES transit_authorities ("transit_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_routes" (
  "stop_route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop-route association */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the stop within the route */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time at the stop */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated departure time from the stop */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time at the stop */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time from the stop */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the vehicle is delayed at the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_routes_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_routes_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the schedule */,
  "schedule_time" TEXT /* Time of the schedule */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of vehicle for the schedule */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the schedule is valid (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the schedule is for a holiday */,
  "is_peak_hour" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the schedule is during peak hours */,
  "is_scheduled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the schedule is planned or ad-hoc */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the schedule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the schedule was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_counts" (
  "passenger_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger count entry */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "count_date" TEXT /* Date of the count */,
  "count_time" TEXT /* Time of the count */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the passengers (e.g., child, adult, senior) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passengers (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "purpose_of_travel" TEXT /* Purpose of the travel (e.g., work, school, leisure) */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time when the passengers boarded the vehicle */,
  "alighting_time" TEXT /* Time when the passengers alighted from the vehicle */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the count */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the count was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_counts_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_counts_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., shelter, bench, information kiosk) */,
  "amenity_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the amenity (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the amenity */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection of the amenity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the amenity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the amenity was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nearby_points_of_interest" (
  "poi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point of interest */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "poi_name" TEXT /* Name of the point of interest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the point of interest */,
  "distance_from_stop" REAL /* Distance from the stop (in meters) */,
  "poi_type" TEXT /* Type of point of interest (e.g., park, museum, restaurant) */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the point of interest */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the point of interest */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the point of interest (e.g., 3.5 out of 5) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the point of interest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the point of interest was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nearby_points_of_interest_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accessibility_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accessibility feature */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the accessibility feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accessibility feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of accessibility feature (e.g., ramp, tactile paving) */,
  "feature_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the accessibility feature (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the feature */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection of the feature */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feature was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accessibility_features_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)
